title: Surprise! Facial recognition smart locks are actually good
summary: I tested the four locks you can buy today with facial recognition unlocking — the $300 Eufy FamiLock E40, the $350 Lockly Visage Zeno, Lockin’s $199 Veno Solar Face, and Switchbot’s $230 Lock Vision…
